spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Dense, data correlation. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap strategy: gap-4 or gap-6. Use col-span-1 for summaries, col-span-2 or 3 for main tables/charts.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content, labels, inputs, tabular data. Right-align numerical columns in tables (prices, P/L) so decimals align perfectly.

surface_strategy.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-[#E5E7EB]), zero shadow. Strict grid layout.
surface_strategy.hover_state: Slight background darkening (hover:bg-gray-50), do NOT use translate-y for dense tables.
surface_strategy.interactive_elements: Hover state must be a lighter hue of the active state. Focus states must have high contrast rings.

component_guidelines.holdings_table: Shadcn Table. Dense layout. Ticker symbols wrapped in a subtle badge. P/L column color-coded with accent_profit (green) and accent_loss (red).
component_guidelines.ai_recommendations_panel: Split into 3 sections (Safe Exits, New Buys, Value Picks). Use Shadcn Cards with solid borders. Differentiate sections with subtle icon cues. Use crisp, actionable microcopy.
component_guidelines.add_edit_stock_form: Shadcn Form/Dialog. Two-column layout for desktop. Input fields should be flush and cleanly aligned.
component_guidelines.market_overview: Top bar or distinct widget using 'ticker tape' style horizontal scroll (react-fast-marquee) or dense grid. Display Nifty 50 and Sensex clearly.
component_guidelines.stock_detail_view: Shadcn Tabs (Overview, AI Analysis, Fundamentals). Use Recharts for sparklines/trend line. No fancy gradient fills on charts, just a solid 2px line (green or red based on trend).

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Functional, not decorative.

ai_agent_avatar.description: Professional avatar representing the AI Trade Agent

motion_and_interactions.loading_state: Shadcn Skeleton blocks for data tables, mimicking the 'F-Pattern' layout.
motion_and_interactions.tooltips: Fast tooltips (delay 100ms) for acronyms or AI reasoning snippets.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure black/dark grey on white for data. Minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, form inputs, table rows, and tab triggers using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'add-holding-button', 'stock-row-hdfc').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
Initialize Shadcn UI and add components: table, card, button, dialog, input, form, badge, tabs, skeleton.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the rigid grid structure. Grid children MUST be direct children.
DO NOT use generic colors like teal or purple. Stick strictly to the defined stark white/grey base with red/green financial indicators.
Right-align all numerical values in tables to ensure decimal points align.
Wrap ticker symbols in a small monospace badge for clear scannability.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements as requested in CRITICAL RULES.
